articles.description: Nottingham Forest are fighting for Premier League survival but reaching the Europa League quarter-finals could provide hope in an otherwise torrid season.
articles.title: Famous night for Nottingham Forest in a season to otherwise forget

articles.description: Aston Villa were urged not to become a "maybe" team. Yet maybe this is their year to end a 30-year trophy drought.
articles.title: Emi Martinez: Aston Villa goalkeeper puts them closer to Europa League glory under Unai Emery

articles.description: The England squad Thomas Tuchel names on Friday will give a big hint about who will be on the plane to the World Cup - so what are the issues he still needs to resolve?
articles.title: England friendlies: Thomas Tuchel picks final squad before he makes World Cup selection

articles.description: Entering a football match in England and Wales without a ticket will become a criminal offence under new laws.
articles.title: Tailgating at football matches to become criminal offence

articles.description: Audi team principal Jonathan Wheatley is wanted by Aston Martin to lead their troubled Formula 1 team.
articles.title: Jonathan Wheatley: Aston Martin target Audi F1 boss for team principal role under Adrian Newey

articles.description: Luke Littler comes from 5-0 down to stun Gerwyn Price 6-5 in the final of Premier League Darts in Dublin where there were two maximum 170 checkouts in one game.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler stuns Gerwyn Price after two 170 finishes

articles.description: Fifa fines the Israeli Football Association 150,000 Swiss Francs (£141,700) and warns it about its future conduct after investigating an "alleged offence of discrimination" by the Palestine FA.
articles.title: Israel FA fined for 'discrimination and racist abuse' by Fifa

articles.description: Senior football correspondent Sami Mokbel breaks down Manchester United's search for a new midfielder to replace the outgoing Casemiro.
articles.title: Manchester United: Casemiro replacement contenders include Anderson, Wharton and Tonali

articles.description: Caf executive committee member Augustin Senghor says the decision to strip Senegal of the 2025 Afcon title is "unacceptable, abject and we have to denounce it".
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Senegal's title being handed to Morocco 'has to be denounced', says Caf executive

articles.description: Ismaila Sarr scores twice to book Conference League last-eight spot for Crystal Palace after victory against AEK Larnaca, who have two players sent off.
articles.title: AEK Larnaca 1-2 Crystal Palace (1-2 on agg): Ismaila Sarr scores twice to book last-eight spot
